title: Damaged Tools and Weapons
description: Damaged items based on its material's durability
body:
# Info
In Version _v1.1.1_ netherite pickaxe has been retextured

![Netherite Pickaxe (retextured)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dcd4c87ade57e38637e49e77cdcbed5f04d0bab6.png)
## Note that v1.1 adds **all tools**, but it doesn't mean I'll stop changing this resourcepack!
Version _v1.1_ Adds **all tools, including hoes** as _broken_ (**depending on material's durability**)!:
1. **Golden hoe** (most damaged/shortened)
1. **Wooden hoe** (almost most damaged/shortened)
1. **Stone hoe** (slightly damaged/shortened)
1. **Iron hoe** (almost normal)
1. **Diamond hoe** (normal one)
1. **Netherite hoe** (no damage + added more texture on it)
![The preview of the hoes:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aa299a6a23451b8a4cdf71e731329f26ac7cfcda.png)
### -
Version _v1.0.3_ Adds **shovel, axes, pickaxes, and swords** as _broken_ (**depending on material's durability**)!:
1. **Golden shovel** (most damaged, but added red aura around it)
1. **Wooden shovel** (almost most damaged)
1. **Stone shovel** (slightly damaged)
1. **Iron shovel** (almost normal)
1. **Diamond shovel** (normal one)
1. **Netherite shovel** (no damage + changed texture a little bit)
![The preview of the shovels:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd4bb6c3a9cc04db87d05db5ed20c3a0725a1e20.png)
### -
Version _v1.0.2_ Adds **axes, pickaxes, and swords** as _broken_ (**depending on material's durability**)!:
1. **Golden axe** (most damaged, but added red aura around it)
1. **Wooden axe** (almost most damaged)
1. **Stone axe** (slightly damaged)
1. **Iron axe** (almost normal)
1. **Diamond axe** (normal one)
1. **Netherite axe** (no damage + changed texture a little bit)
![The preview of the axes:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d5cc657483af18102095473618cb84be8b68420.png)
### -
Version _v1.0.1_ Adds **pickaxes and swords** as _broken_ (**depending on material's durability**)!:
1. **Golden pickaxe** (most damaged/shortened)
1. **Wooden pickaxe** (almost most damaged/shortened)
1. **Stone pickaxe** (slightly damaged/shortened)
1. **Iron pickaxe** (almost normal)
1. **Diamond pickaxe** (normal one)
1. **Netherite pickaxe** (no damage + added more texture on it)
![The preview of the pickaxes:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9beae6fa2f719647a254aa285e2e2f9a1f63ffa4.png)
### -
Version _v1.0_ Adds all types of **tools** as _broken_ (**depending on material's durability**)!:
1. **Golden sword** (most damaged)
1. **Wooden sword** (almost most damaged)
1. **Stone sword** (slightly damaged)
1. **Iron sword** (almost normal)
1. **Diamond sword** (changed texture a little bit)
1. **Netherite sword** (no damage + added more texture on it)
![The preview of the swords:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f91f53250f694142f3364364d32350bf6bb5708b.png)
# **WARNING**
You can freely use my resourcepack in your videos/images if you credit me :)
